broadcast_add_bias_nchw.note: This is the Conv2D bias add pattern. If this fails, every Conv output is wrong.

conv1d_dfl.note: YOLOv8 DFL block: softmax then conv1d with weights [0..15] to get expected bin index

softmax_axis_neg1.description: [1,2,4] softmax axis=-1 -> probabilities along last dim
